name: Bodycam:Adrenaline
short_description: Bodycam: adrenaline – High-Intensity Tactical Shooting with Extreme Visual Impact! Bodycam: adrenaline is an ultra-realistic tactical shooter that immerses players in the heat of combat through a bodycam perspective.
detailed_description:
You are a professional hitman working for a criminal organization. One day, you wake up in an unknown location with a body camera strapped to you. Soon, you receive a phone call from a member of a rival gang, informing you that you’ve been injected with a deadly poison. This poison suppresses adrenaline production, causing your heart to stop beating. You only have one hour to live unless you can maintain a high level of adrenaline—otherwise, you will die. The only way to temporarily delay the poison’s effects is by constantly stimulating adrenaline through killing. Determined to seek revenge in your final moments, you also search for an antidote to save yourself.

-High-intensity action

-fast-paced combat

-hyper-realistic visuals

-bullet time mechanics

-insane hit effects.
